query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: Two people in a dark space creating a light painting photograph. On the left, a profile view of a person is visible, partially illuminated. In the center-right, another person faces forward while holding a small yellow light source in their right hand. The long exposure captures continuous white light trails that form a large outlined silhouette of a human profile overlapping and surrounding the figures, along with looping abstract strokes. The image is framed with a thin white border against a solid black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two people in a dark space create a light painting photograph with intentional motion blur effects. On the left, a profile view of a person appears with uneven illumination. In the center-right, another person faces forward while holding a small yellow light source, their features partially ghosted by the long exposure. The extended shutter captures continuous white light trails that form a large, loosely drawn silhouette of a human profile overlapping the figures in a surreal, dreamlike layering, accompanied by looping abstract strokes and casual snapshot-style framing. The image is framed with a thin white border against a solid black background.
